plan_review_notes: Approved merge-preparation scope: merge PR #9 into main first in an isolated worktree, then reconcile the stacked PR #10 against the updated base and resolve any overlapping-file conflicts safely.

plan_review_history.notes: Approved merge-preparation scope: merge PR #9 into main first in an isolated worktree, then reconcile the stacked PR #10 against the updated base and resolve any overlapping-file conflicts safely.

spec_review_notes: Spec frozen for safe PR merge preparation only. Work stays in the dedicated task worktree, preserves unrelated local dirtiness, and covers PR #9 merge plus PR #10 post-merge reconciliation.

normal_cases.name: PR #9 merged cleanly into `main` and the updated `main` was pushed.
PR #10 was reconciled against the post-PR-#9 base and merged after conflict resolution.

edge_cases.name: Overlapping files in `audit.py`, `closeout.py`, `planning.py`, `workflow.py`, and `tests/test_taskflow.py` were resolved without dropping either the task-record locking behavior or the `sisyphus` naming compatibility work.
Local unrelated dirty files in the repository root remained untouched because merge work stayed in the isolated task worktree.

exception_cases.name: A post-merge regression in the close fixture was corrected by excluding internal `task.json.lock` files from dirty-worktree gating, and the branch remained recoverable throughout.

verification_methods.target: PR #9 merges cleanly into main and the updated main is pushed.
verification_methods.method: git merge --ff-only origin/feat/task-record-locking-and-time-utils and git push origin HEAD:main

verification_methods.target: PR #10 is reconciled against the post-PR-#9 base and remains mergeable after conflict resolution.
verification_methods.method: manual conflict review plus git commit and push of merge commit 48d9ee4

verification_methods.target: Overlapping files that changed in both PRs are resolved without dropping either behavior set.
Local unrelated dirty files in the repository root remain untouched because merge work happens only in the isolated task worktree.
verification_methods.method: manual review of root worktree status during merge

verification_methods.target: A merge regression is corrected without leaving the branch unrecoverable.
verification_methods.method: targeted close fixture rerun plus full unittest suite
